mechanics.excerpt: Although super-strong limbs can be constructed, the remaining natural muscles the wearer" body cannot accommodate the high stresses_ Any character with Surgery Skill Bonus of 2 or higher can install Type artificial limb More advanced limbs are avail: able only in hospitals ad must fitted by doctor with Surgery Skill Bonus of 5 or higher Characters who receive artificial limbs must train for Six weeks to gain full use of the new limb.
